name: Cabbage Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 medium-sized cabbage (about 2 lbs.), coarsely sliced into about 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1 About 1 3/4 hours before serving: In a 5 quart Dutch oven or saucepot over high heat, cook ground beef and onions until pan juices evaporate and meat is well browned, stirring occasionally.
2 Remove the Dutch oven from heat. Add cabbage, carrots, pepper and 2 1/2 teaspoons salt. Toss to mix well.
3 Pour rice into a 3 quart casserole dish. Spoon beef mixture on top of rice.
4 Pour beef broth and 1/2 cup water over mixture. Cover.
5 Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in an oven set to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6 To serve, stir ground beef with rice to mix well.
Yield: 6 servings.
